visual_summary: Animated Shiny Text Demo displays a shiny text component with animation when hovered. It's likely used for highlighting and adding visual effects to important UI elements. Developers would use this component for showcasing special features or promotions.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Animated Shiny Text Demo
Description: Animated Shiny Text Demo displays a shiny text component with animation when hovered. It's likely used for highlighting and adding visual effects to important UI elements. Developers would use this component for showcasing special features or promotions.
Style: minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: animation, text, effects

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
